plugin_desc: Raisecom ROAP/ROS access-device SNMP collection under enterprise PEN 8886. Beyond the shared Access SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic, it collects vendor health deltas for total CPU utilization, memory total/free/usage, device temperature, fan state and power supply state. Optical transceiver, PON and alarm tables are not promoted to shared device-health metrics.
name: Access

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: Total CPU busy percentage from raisecomTotalCPUUtilizationOneMin, reported directly as a percentage.

metrics.name: device_memory_total
metrics.description: Total device memory from raisecomMemoryTotal, reported in bytes.

metrics.name: device_memory_free
metrics.description: Available device memory from raisecomMemoryAvailable, reported in bytes.

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilization computed from Raisecom total and available memory.

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Device temperature from raisecomTemperatureValue, reported directly in degrees Celsius.

metrics.name: device_fan_state
metrics.description: Fan work state from raisecomFanWorkState, normalized so that normal(1) is healthy and every other value is abnormal.

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: Power supply status from raisecomPowerStatus, normalized so that online and power-on are healthy while offline or unknown values are abnormal.
